'''Diana Albers''' is a comic book [[Wikipedia:letterer|letterer]] who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] comic series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 46|''Star Wars'' (1977) 46]]
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 3: Resurrection of Evil]]''
